name: hb_1_26
requirements: As part of your analysis, for 2025-06-10 compute the coefficient of variation (population std / mean) of hourly flue-gas for each company and store: cv_puyang (Hebei Puyang Steel), cv_ruifeng (Tangshan Ruifeng Steel), cv_ganglu (Tangshan Ganglu Steel) (float) and most_consistent_company_id (the company_id of the lowest-CV company, int).

turns.query: Identify the most consistent emission performer among specialized steel companies: Hebei Puyang Steel, Tangshan Ruifeng Steel, Tangshan Ganglu Steel on 2025-06-10.
